Child Health, Care, Welfare and Development (ii) Dr. Dinesh Laroia 52/54, 3rd Floor, Ramjas Road, New Delhi-110005. -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART 3(ii)] Elimination of Child Labour or Children in Distress (iii) Dr. Yogesh Dube Dube House, Carter Road No. 9, Borivali (East), Mumbai-400066. Laws relating to Children (iv) Ms. Dipa Dixit AB-7, Tilak Marg, NewDelhi-110001. Child Psychology or Sociology (v) Shri Vinod Kumar Tikoo 823/G11-13, Paschim Vihar, New Delhi-110087. 2. The above members shall hold office for a period of three years w.c.f. the date of taking charge or until further orders, whichever is earlier. [F. No. 3-11/2010-C W-1] VIVEK JOSH1, Jt. Secy.
